text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at the autumn Tenno Sho. Satono
Diamond and Kitasan Black are ecstatic to finally
be here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has always looked up to Mejiro
McQueen. But she's not here to admire her
today—she's here to beat her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With their dream race finally a reality, Satono
Diamond and Kitasan Black both declare their
intent to claim victory!
